sections.paragraph:
(for צִיצִית) f. prop. something like a flower or feather (from צִיץ with the fem. adj. termination ־ִית), hence-

(1) the forelock of the hair (comp. the root נָצָה), Eze 8:3.

(2) the borders, the fringed edges (Ouafte, Troddel), which the Israelites wore on the corners of their garments, Num 15:38, 39 Num 15:39.
